task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Dashboards section of Emoncms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Emoncms interface shows the Dashboards page, typically indicated by 'Dashboards' being highlighted in the navigation menu or the page header.

task_completion.description: The agent initiated the creation of a new dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'New', 'Add', or '+' button on the Dashboards page, resulting in a new entry, modal, or input field appearing.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the name 'Home Energy Monitor' for the new dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Home Energy Monitor' is visible in the dashboard name input field or being typed by the agent.

task_completion.description: The dashboard 'Home Energy Monitor' is successfully saved and visible in the dashboards list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Dashboards list displays a saved entry with the exact name 'Home Energy Monitor'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Emoncms web GUI to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser interface (clicking buttons, typing in fields) rather than using terminal commands, scripts, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Emoncms application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost and the Emoncms interface is visible, rather than a text editor or a mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the dashboard list.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to modify the DOM text to 'Home Energy Monitor'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Emoncms is an energy monitoring web application. Dashboard creation must be done manually via the GUI, as there is no direct API endpoint for dashboard creation. The task requires creating a dashboard named exactly 'Home Energy Monitor'. The final state must show this dashboard saved in the Emoncms dashboards list.
